name: Zucchini Soup
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 oz (1 cup) Cream of Chicken Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover and microwave zucchini, onion, and butter in a 2-quart casserole on high until vegetables are tender, 9 to 11 minutes.
2. Pour the soup into a blender container and add 1 cup of water along with the zucchini mixture. Blend on medium-high speed until smooth, about 1 minute.
3. Return the blended mixture back to the casserole dish. Stir in the remaining 1 cup of water, salt, basil, and pepper. Cover and microwave on high until hot and bubbly, 8 to 10 minutes. The soup can be refrigerated and served cold.
